Package org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise

Class AIRecordInsight

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise.SObject
org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise.AIRecordInsight
public class AIRecordInsight extends SObject

Java class for AIRecordInsight complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="AIRecordInsight">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}sObject">
       <sequence>
         <element name="AIInsightActions" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="AIInsightFeedbacks" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="AIInsightValues" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="AiApplication" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}AIApplication" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="AiApplicationId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Confidence" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedBy" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}User" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedById" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsDeleted" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastModifiedBy" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}User" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastModifiedById" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastModifiedDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="MlPredictionDefinition" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}MLPredictionDefinition" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="MlPredictionDefinitionId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ModelId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Name" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="PredictionField" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="RunGuid" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="RunStartTime" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Status" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="SystemModstamp" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Target" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}Contract" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="TargetField" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="TargetId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="TargetSobjectType" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Type" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="UserRecordAccess" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}UserRecordAccess" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ValidUntil" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
